name: @v6/graph-tools
description: Utility CLI and library for loading, querying, and rendering generators from the v6 catalog graph.

scripts.smoke: node ./src/cli.mjs stats --root ../../.. && node ./src/cli.mjs get agent:a5c --root ../../.. --json && node ./src/cli.mjs render --root ../../.. --template wiki/generators/templates/examples/layers.md.tmpl --kind Layer --missing attributes.parentLayerId --stdout
